instruction,teaching	Andrew Ng
Lecture
Andrew Ng is conducting the lecture, providing instruction on statistical topics.

classification,family relation,model category,probability distribution,relationship	Exponential Family Distribution
Gaussian Distribution
Gaussian distribution is classified as a member of the exponential family of distributions.<SEP>The Gaussian distribution is classified as part of the exponential family of distributions, as stated in the lecture.<SEP>The Gaussian Distribution is an example of a distribution that is part of the Exponential Family Distribution.

generalization,statistical method	Logistic Regression
Softmax Regression
Softmax regression is viewed as a generalization of logistic regression to handle multiple classes.

estimation,statistical method	Maximum Likelihood Estimate
Parameters
The maximum likelihood estimate is used for estimating the parameters of statistical models as referenced in the lecture.

Training Set
The training set is used in the maximum likelihood method to estimate model parameters.

Indicator Function
The expected value is calculated using the indicator function to determine probabilities of different outcomes.

Y

Theta
Theta values are used in the function F to find zero crossings during the optimization process.

Newtons Method
Newton’s Method is described as often running faster than gradient ascent when fitting models.

Theta
Function L is maximized by finding the value of theta where its derivative equals zero.

Theta
